dataSource: Pending — Snowflake access requested via Denis K
headline: Code shipped 6 days ago. Awaiting analytics access to pull first weekly cut from RudderStack/Snowflake.

thisWeekShipped.title: iOS Title Case rename + collision fix
thisWeekShipped.detail: PR #4138 — renamed login_failed → 'Login attempt failed' to avoid legacy event collision. Merged to release-3.23.0, deployed to prod 2026-04-30.

thisWeekShipped.title: Pre-deploy event firing validated
thisWeekShipped.detail: Artur ran a Snowflake check before deploy. All 9 new events were reaching RAW.RUDDER_EVENTS tables — instrumentation healthy at the wire level.

thisWeekShipped.title: Analytics Plan finalized with Tristan
thisWeekShipped.detail: North star, must-have events, guardrail metrics, and pre-commit threshold suggestion documented in Confluence.

experimentMeta.northStar: Did the rate of barbers accidentally creating Indie accounts go down?
experimentMeta.primaryMetric: ACCOUNT_CREATED where account_type = 'indie' AND came_from = 'signup_link', segmented by variant
experimentMeta.successThreshold: Flow B wins if indie signups drop ≥30% without reducing login completion by more than 10%

flows.flowA: Current/control flow — separate Sign In and Sign Up entry points
flows.flowB: Email-first flow — single entry, email check decides path

launchDarkly.note: LaunchDarkly dashboard. Shows ~61/39 split — possible SRM. To be cross-checked against RudderStack as source of truth (per Yurii).

openIssues.title: Sample Ratio Mismatch in LaunchDarkly
openIssues.status: Plan: cross-check with RudderStack/Snowflake once access lands

openIssues.status: Flagged in PR descriptions, no owner identified yet
